channel.title: Projects on Ezra Natanael
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Ezra Natanael

item.title: Introducing Macshift
item.description: I created Macshift as a fun project to help people quickly change their MAC addresses on Windows. It’s a command-line tool written in Go, designed to give users better control over their network adapters without getting too technical. Here’s a simple rundown of how it works and why it might be useful! What is a MAC Address? A MAC address (short for Media Access Control address) is like a unique ID for each device that connects to a network.
